heading: Maximum contingent liability
label: 9633 Maximum contingent liability
notes: Amendments2025— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text of section read as follows: “The maximum contingent liability of the Corporation outstanding at any one time shall not exceed in the aggregate $60,000,000,000.”Pub. L. 119–60
amendments: Amendments2025— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text of section read as follows: “The maximum contingent liability of the Corporation outstanding at any one time shall not exceed in the aggregate $60,000,000,000.”Pub. L. 119–60

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The maximum contingent liability of the Corporation outstanding at any one time shall not exceed in the aggregate $205,000,000,000.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: b Rule of construction
children.text: The maximum contingent liability shall apply to all extension of liability by the Corporation regardless of the authority cited thereto.
